回国第一天，上将亲自迎接：“给你最高权限，组建一支全军最强的特种部队。”
于是，全军震动——
金色调令：可调用任何单位任何人，无需协商。
无限预算：装备全球顶尖，实验武器优先试用。
先斩后奏：境外行动无需审批，国内任务可击毙任何抵抗者。
林啸只问一句：“我要的人，都是刺头怎么办？”
上将：“刺头？我要的就是能扎穿一切的尖刀！”
从此，龙渊出世——
一人灭一连，只是开始。
单兵拦导弹，常规操作。
30人vs3000精锐，完胜而归。
全球特种兵大赛？不，那是我们的教学演示。
当最后一面敌人旗帜倒下，林啸对世界宣告：
“此旗所向，皆为国土。龙渊所至，片甲不留。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/67fc29dbbb69f3a2546ba66c4e313d74","author":"核心价值客户","author_id":"","book_id":"7590444444046855193","book_name":"绝对兵王：开局组建全军第一杀器","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":518,"name":"特工","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518&name=特工&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590815306126213657","read_count":"21541","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"366140"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"164","tags":"都市日常,都市,特工,打脸,特种兵,开局,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f660b4c62fa3de321d7fe5ac2e10e21e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178365&x-signature=jDYCsx%2Buo8tllt8RNej7rNsMDi8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"940779606667704","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320161245DCD7CDA6025556506C0A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"re
